47 Meters Down: Uncaged (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,260,900Details
International Box Office $25,321,663
Worldwide Box Office $47,582,563
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $344,343
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,062,914
Total $1,407,257
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A group of five girls from different backgrounds and countries are united by their lust for life and adventure in the coastal metropolis of Recife. Looking to get off the well-worn tourist trail, they hear about a hidden underwater ruin from a local guide and seize the opportunity to discover their own Atlantis beneath the turquoise waves. Unbeknownst to them, the caves where the forgotten city lies are not completely uninhabited, and as they swim deeper into the submerged labyrinth of caves they enter the territory of the deadliest shark species in the ocean.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,427,265 (37.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,853 opening theaters/2,883 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,065,539

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 16th, 2019 (Wide) by Entertainment Studios Motion Pictures
International Releases: August 15th, 2019 (Wide), released as СИНЯЯ БЕЗДНА 2 (Russia (CIS))
August 16th, 2019 (Wide) (Spain)
August 16th, 2019 (Wide) (Lithuania)
August 28th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
August 30th, 2019 (Wide), released as 47 Metros: Medo Profundo (Portugal)
Video Release: October 29th, 2019 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for creature related violence and terror, some bloody images and brief rude gestures.
(Rating bulletin 2587 (Cert #52279), 7/17/2019)
Running Time: 89 minutes
Franchise: 47 Meters Down
Cast, crew, or production detail: Standalone Sequel
Geographical setting: Brazil
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Dysfunctional Family, Step-Family, Tourists In Trouble, Underwater, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Survival Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: The Fyzz Facility, Entertainment Studios Motion Pictures
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A group of five girls from different backgrounds and countries are united by their lust for life and adventure in the coastal metropolis of Recife. Looking to get off the well-worn tourist trail, they hear about a hidden underwater ruin from a local guide and seize the opportunity to discover their own Atlantis beneath the turquoise waves. Unbeknownst to them, the caves where the forgotten city lies are not completely uninhabited, and as they swim deeper into the submerged labyrinth of caves they enter the territory of the deadliest shark species in the ocean.
